todos.content: Analyze current database schema and identify what changes are needed for sleep mode detection
Update database schema to add device type and rated power fields
Implement sleep mode detection logic based on power consumption thresholds
Update savings calculation to compare actual usage vs rated power consumption
Test the new logic with sample data
